benefit: Unipicket VisionTong is an AI image recognition real-time notification system that integrates image recognition models and algorithms. It adopts a ground-level edge computing architecture and uses a common RTSP protocol image stream to instantly identify and report a variety of hazardous events in existing monitor screens, such as human figures, vehicles, fire smoke, and personnel movements. Lighting changes, safety protective gear, etc. can identify and report hazardous safety incidents immediately or in their early stages, shortening the reporting time of hazardous safety incidents and reducing the expansion of disasters. The integrated reporting interface can integrate other IOT sensing and VMS/CMS systems, saving manpower and improving overall safety in various manufacturing sites.

benefit:
【Solution to pain points】
Equipment abnormality notifications are slow, missing the best opportunity to respond; manual compilation of reports is time-consuming and error-prone, and supervisors need to manually check the data; although the data is collected, it lacks analysis and interpretation, and decisions can only be made based on experience.

[Benefit description]
Real-time visualization of the entire factory: Real-time + historical dashboard integrates situation carousel, energy, and report modules to grasp equipment and production line status at a glance
Immediate notification of exceptions: Alarm push is synchronized across devices to shorten fault response time
Zero manual work on reports: Automatically generate Excel, eliminating the need for manual sorting and formatting
GenAIoT AI smart analysis: Ask questions in natural language to get charts and conclusions, no BI technical background is required; automatically mark abnormal periods and generate summaries to assist management in making quick decisions, and can also be used as a training tool for new employees
Exclusive summary for management: Data e-newsletters are delivered regularly, providing more basis for decision-making
[Actual import results]
Frozen food factory (Hai Rui Food): +6% production capacity increase, -63% raw material loss rate; Precision Foundry (Lianyi Casting): -30% process defect rate, -20% fan electricity consumption.

benefit:
AISVision
Solve pain points
1. Manual visual inspection is inefficient and prone to misjudgment due to fatigue.
2. There are many types of production line defects and inconsistent standards, making it difficult to quantify
Main benefits
1. Consistent and stable judgment standards: avoid human subjective errors
2. Rapid model training and deployment: shortening the time for new product introduction and testing
3. Quality data traceability: supports quality analysis and continuous improvement
4. Reduce labor costs and improve yield rate

Detector
Solve pain points
1. The test signals (vibration, current, temperature, acoustics, etc.) have a large amount of data and are difficult to interpret in real time manually.
2. There is a lot of noise in the signal, and abnormal features are difficult to identify.
Main benefits
Automatic identification of abnormal signals: Find the real abnormal pattern from the noise
Early detection of potential problems: early warning before failure or quality abnormality
Reduce misjudgments and missed judgments: smarter judgment than fixed thresholds

SODA
Solve pain points
1. Scheduling relies on manual labor and experience, and adjustments are time-consuming and error-prone.
2. It is difficult to balance multiple machines, multiple work orders, and multiple restrictions (delivery, manpower, equipment)
3. Order insertion, delays, and equipment abnormalities cause the original schedule to frequently fail.
4. Unable to quickly simulate the impact of different scheduling solutions on production capacity and delivery time
Main benefits
1. Intelligent production scheduling: automatically consider delivery time, production capacity, and constraints
2. Real-time rearrangement capability: quick adjustment in response to orders or abnormalities
3. Improve on-time delivery rate (OTD): effectively reduce delays and traffic jams
4. Improve equipment and manpower utilization
5. Scenario simulation and decision support: assist managers in choosing the best scheduling solution


PHM
Solve pain points
1. Equipment failure cannot be predicted and can only be repaired passively.
2. Unplanned shutdowns cause significant production capacity losses
3. Over-maintenance or under-maintenance, cost imbalance
4. Experience relies on senior personnel, and knowledge is difficult to pass on
Main benefits
1. Equipment health monitoring: grasp the operating status in real time
2. Predictive Maintenance: plan maintenance in advance
3. Reduce the risk of downtime: Improve equipment availability (OEE)
4. Digitization of knowledge: reducing reliance on personal experience

Smart City
Main benefits
Use Gen AI to assist customized needs

Main benefits

2. Predictive Maintenance: plan maintenance in advance
3. Reduce the risk of downtime: Improve equipment availability (OEE)
4. Digitization of knowledge: reducing reliance on personal experience

solution: Sure enough, AI Enterprise Knowledge Management Platform
tech: Generative AI, large language model (LLM, including OpenAI, Claude, Gemini), RAG retrieval-augmented generation (Retrieval-Augmented Generation), vector database semantic retrieval (OpenSearch Service), AI Agent task agent (including semantic understanding, intent recognition, dynamic tool calling Tool-Use), document parsing and NLP natural language processing, Embedding model (text vectorization), evaluation algorithm (automatic scoring of resume and position compliance)
benefit:
Solve pain points: Small and medium-sized enterprises generally face digital transformation dilemmas such as high AI technology thresholds, lack of professional and technical talents, time-consuming repetitive work, and scattered multi-platform services leading to high learning costs and accumulated subscription fees. Taking the human resources scenario as an example, it takes more than 5 hours for a single HR to process 100 resumes, and it still needs to take into account other tasks such as training, salary, and performance.

Benefit description: This solution is expected to improve the efficiency of human resources-related tasks by 30% to 50%, the AI ​​response accuracy rate will reach more than 90%, and the system availability will reach more than 95%. Enterprises do not need to build their own IT infrastructure, it can be used through a browser, and the subscription system reduces the entry threshold. Specific functions include: automatic screening analysis and ranking of resumes, AI generation and automatic sending of interview invitations, and smart Q&A in the enterprise knowledge base (covering SOPs, regulations, and training resources).

Technical description: The system uses a three-layer microservice architecture and runs on the AWS cloud (ECS/EKS container service plus Lambda). The core is a cross-module AI task agent engine that operates in three layers: first understand the business needs of the user, then determine which system resources to use, and finally arrange the steps for execution. This set of Agent has the ability to call autonomous tools. The user can give instructions in spoken language, and the AI ​​will decide on its own which tools to call to do things, such as sending letters, checking calendars, and parsing files. It can be completed from start to finish without the need for human intervention step by step.

The platform also integrates large-scale language models from multiple major manufacturers, including Google Gemini, Anthropic Claude, OpenAI ChatGPT, etc. Users can switch between different models according to task needs in the same interface, without having to jump to different platforms to operate separately, nor do they need to pay for subscriptions. The system will automatically allocate the most appropriate model based on the type of task, such as using a model with strong reasoning capabilities to do resume analysis and comparison, using a model with good quality to write an invitation letter, and combining the strengths of each model.
Knowledge retrieval uses RAG with a vector database to reduce the probability of AI giving random answers. The file parsing module can accept resumes in various formats (both PDF and Word). In terms of information security, VPC is used for network isolation and SSL encryption throughout the transmission process. Each customer's data is stored independently without interfering with each other.

solution: Google Gemini (based on Google Cloud Vertex AI platform)
tech: The multi-modal generative AI model developed by Google can integrate text, code, images, video and audio, and provides end-to-end AI application development and deployment in the manufacturing industry through the Vertex AI enterprise-level platform. Multimodal Understanding: Simultaneously process factory images, sensor data and maintenance records.  Generative AI: Automatically generate maintenance manuals, program codes and quality analysis reports.  Computer Vision: Used for real-time defect detection and industrial safety image recognition.  Natural Language Processing (NLP): Voice operation instructions, cross-language technical document translation and retrieval.  Predictive Analytics: Use historical data to predict equipment maintenance. , Gemini 3 series (Pro / Flash / Ultra): Multi-modal Transformer model with millions of long context windows (Context Window).  Nano Banana: A visual model developed specifically for high-fidelity image generation and editing.  Veo 3.1: The leading video generation model, which can be used to simulate production processes or employee education and training videos.  Med-Gemini (optional): If it involves medical care in the factory, there is a medical-specific fine-tuning model.
benefit: Solve pain points: Solve the dilemma of traditional AI being difficult to understand unstructured data (such as old masters' handwritten notes, noisy factory videos), and improve the low efficiency of production line changeovers, missed quality inspections, and gaps in experience inheritance.  Benefit description: Improve file processing efficiency by more than 40%, shorten the training cycle for new employees, reduce unwarned downtime, and achieve real-time multi-modal defect monitoring.  Technical description: Through "long context" technology, Gemini can read the entire equipment operation manual (thousands of pages) at once, allowing frontline workers to instantly obtain precise maintenance suggestions through voice when encountering a fault.
deployment: Hybrid deployment (Hybrid): Some systems are in the cloud and some are on-premises

tech: Supervised Learning: used in machine monitoring, quality monitoring and processing abnormality warnings.   Deep Learning: * Process Optimization: Used for NC machining intelligent optimization and tool wear improvement.   Spindle thermal displacement compensation: Establish a thermal compensation model to ensure machining accuracy.   Classic machine learning algorithm: In cases such as plastic injection, multi-variable linear models, random forests and neural networks are used to find key factors (such as cooling time, injection pressure) from hundreds of thousands of machine adjustment parameters.   Computer Vision: Including image recognition, X-ray inspection image analysis, machine vision application and AOI+AI integration for parts identification and quality defect detection.   Predictive Analytics: * Equipment predictive maintenance: Monitor the current operation of equipment subsystems (such as heaters and fan motors) to predict the risk of failure.   Cost and material forecasting: Trend forecasting of prices and working hours for aerospace materials. , AI xWare smart manufacturing integration platform uses a variety of artificial intelligence algorithms and models in different application scenarios, which can be summarized into the following categories: 1. Machine Learning model (Machine Learning) When processing structured data (such as production parameters, material prices), the platform uses a variety of classic models: Multivariate Linear Model: used for parameter analysis and prediction. Random Forest Model: used to handle complex tuning factor screening. Neural Network Model: applied to fitting and prediction of nonlinear data. Regression and tree models: In the material valuation system, 30 different regression and tree models were experimentally tested to select the best one. AutoML (Automatic Machine Learning): Proof of concept (PoC) and modeling using ProphetAI AutoML. 2. Deep Learning & Generative AI (Deep Learning & Generative AI) For more complex perception and cognitive tasks, the platform has introduced Deep Learning: used to establish thermal compensation models, NC processing optimization and image recognition. Large Language Model (LLM): Deploy local open source models as the core of smart assistants. RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation): Used to build a normative knowledge base so that the AI ​​assistant can accurately retrieve company procedure documents and quality specifications. ReAct Loop (reasoning-action loop): used in the AI ​​Agent architecture to enable AI to think, plan and perform complex tasks (such as using tools or issuing instructions). Knowledge Graph: Assists in in-depth knowledge retrieval and correlation analysis. 3. Domain-specific algorithms and logic combined with professional manufacturing knowledge (Know-how) Specialized algorithms: Physics and electrical logic: Combined with Ohm's law ($V=IR$) and power formula to analyze the current response of the heater subsystem. SCR logical judgment algorithm: Develop a special algorithm to make logical judgments on equipment abnormal light signals. NLP (natural language processing) and semantic analysis: applied to translation, summary generation and voice conference recording processing. These models together form the wisdom center of AI xWare, realizing a complete loop from data perception, behavioral decision-making to action execution.

cases: airaFactory smart factory has been successfully used in domestic and foreign manufacturing fields. A representative case is the Firstohm smart factory introduction project. First Resistor is a resistor manufacturer founded in 1969. In order to improve factory management efficiency and production efficiency, First Resistor introduced the AIRA smart factory solution to achieve a comprehensive upgrade of personnel management, production monitoring and environmental data integration. In terms of personnel management, the AI ​​face recognition access control system and automated attendance mechanism can effectively solve the problems of clock-in and data delay caused by traditional paper management and manual clock-in, while also strengthening the access control of visitors and vendors. Combining full-site personnel tracking and electronic fencing technology, when employees mistakenly enter dangerous areas such as high-temperature areas or mechanical operating areas, an immediate warning can be issued to notify managers, greatly improving operational safety and factory control capabilities. In terms of production monitoring, the system integrates machine operating status and real-time image analysis technology, which can provide immediate notification when an abnormality occurs in the equipment, avoiding product waste caused by continuous feeding, and improving process stability and production efficiency. At the same time, through electronic forms and data integration platforms, attendance, production and equipment data are automatically organized, reducing manual statistics time and improving information accuracy. In addition, through remote monitoring and visual dashboards, the headquarters can instantly grasp the factory operation status and key data, improving decision-making efficiency. The system also integrates environmental sensing equipment such as power consumption monitoring and temperature and humidity. When environmental values ​​are abnormal, it can automatically notify and access image records, strengthening energy management and environmental monitoring capabilities.

summary: Solve the pain points: 1. Manual inspection cannot accurately record and the time cost is too high 2. It is difficult to quickly compare historical records 3. Lack of complete quality records 4. Traditional AOI detection has insufficient flexibility, is sensitive to light sources, angles and product variations, requires frequent adjustment of rules and is susceptible to environmental interference, making it difficult to cope with diversified products and complex defect judgments. Benefit description: 1. Automatically identify subtle defects (such as cracks, scratches), and the defect detection rate can reach 95~98% 2. Compared with traditional manual inspection, AI can establish a standardized inspection process, greatly reducing the problem of human oversight or inconsistent judgment standards, ensuring the consistency of product quality. 3. The introduction of no-code (No-code) model building and smart annotation functions can greatly shorten the AI development cycle, making it easy for people with non-technical backgrounds to get started. 4. Compared with traditional AOI, which relies on fixed rules for judgment, AI can optimize the detection model through continuous learning, effectively improving detection flexibility and environmental adaptability. Technical description: The platform can quickly expand training samples and greatly shorten the labeling time. It also introduces VLM technology to enhance visual understanding and decision-making assistance. Through AIWinOps, enterprises can easily implement standardized processes from model training to edge deployment, effectively overcome the technological transformation threshold, effectively break through the limitations of traditional AOI rule-based detection, promote production line automation and maximize operational efficiency.

tech: It is a smart data analysis platform with machine learning and deep learning as its core, integrating AutoML automated modeling and optimization algorithms.  The platform uses advanced outlier detection technology to build a high-precision model using only positive samples, achieving a 97.5% detection rate for process anomalies and greatly optimizing the judgment speed from 30 minutes to 30 seconds. Through quantitative parameter correlation analysis and intelligent control strategies, NumOps can automatically derive the best operating path and predict future trends, effectively helping organizations stabilize production quality, reduce operating costs, and maximize resource utilization. , 1.Expert System 2.Classification: AutoML, XGBoost, GBM, DRF, XRT, GLM 3.Regression: AutoML, Detection, DeepIsolationForestTS, DeepSVDDTS, TranAD, USAD, COUTA, AnomalyTransformer, TimesNet, DCdetector, DeepSADTS, DevNetTS, PReNetT 6.Clustering: K-means, HDBSCAN

solution: WinEdge instant inference edge computing system
tech: WinEdge is a converged edge computing AI inference system launched by Huiwen Technology. It integrates image-based and data-based AI inference capabilities, and can be paired with the image-based AI model training platform AIWinOps and the data-based AI model training platform NumOps to form a complete WinHub.AI artificial intelligence implementation solution. The platform uses advanced quantitative model inference technology to achieve ultimate computing performance on local devices without sacrificing accuracy, and can perform real-time processing without relying on cloud resources. WinEdge supports centralized monitoring of multiple devices and one-click model update. It can provide low-latency, high-privacy real-time warnings for areas such as construction site safety and machine abnormality monitoring, effectively assisting enterprises to quickly import AI models from the development stage to actual applications at the production site. , 1.classification: YOLOv8-cls, YOLO11-cls 2.object detection: YOLOv4, YOLOv8, YOLO11 3.segmentation: YOLOv8-seg, YOLO11-seg 4.Classification: AutoML, XGBoost, GBM, DRF, XRT, GLM 5.Regression: AutoML, XGBoost, GBM, DRF, XRT, GLM 6.Time Series: RNN, LSTM, GRU, Prophet
benefit: Solved pain points: 1. Manual visual inspection is unstable and can easily miss minor defects. 2. It is difficult to provide early warning for abnormal situations, and downtime affects production capacity. 3. Dangerous behaviors are difficult to detect immediately, and security control relies on manpower. Benefit description: WinEdge is an edge AI solution with local real-time inference as the core, combined with multi-device real-time monitoring and centralized management and deployment technology. The platform supports multi-camera imaging and one-click model update, and can achieve high-performance image processing and NG image storage locally without relying on cloud resources. Through the connection of object tracking, area counting and industrial communication protocols, WinEdge can instantly integrate key data and display inference results through dashboards, helping organizations achieve automated early warning, precise defect detection and cross-device centralized monitoring in a private environment that ensures data privacy, thereby optimizing operational decisions and greatly improving site security. WinEdge supports centralized monitoring of multiple devices and one-click model update. It can provide low-latency, high-privacy real-time warnings for areas such as construction site safety, glass defects, or process abnormalities, effectively assisting enterprises to quickly import AI models from the development stage to actual applications at the production site.

tech: The copywriting generation technology and core technology adopt the natural language processing NLP technology of large language model LLM, which is mainly based on the generative AI model of the Transformer architecture.
benefit: AI marketing copy generator: AI empowerment improves business efficiency and generates product descriptions and marketing copy with one click. Use AI to assist in generating marketing copy of a few hundred words, reducing the time marketers spend thinking about and working on copywriting. The member AI marketing service system integrated through the generative AI ChatGPT helps merchants want to use OMO marketing materials and promotion tools to guide members, so that merchants no longer have to worry about it and can repeatedly market to old or new members without spending expensive marketing expenses. Functional application features: A. Create templates: Create multiple marketing copy templates based on different labels and specific user groups. These templates can contain different titles, openings, content structures, and calls to action, but overall maintain a consistent style and brand language. B. Training the generative model: Input the collected data and templates into the generative model for training. In order to simplify the difficulty and process of digital transformation, Baijia Information has integrated the database of thousands of corporate forms accumulated over the years and generative AI technology, and created "xNinja.AI form designer" based on the 101Form green business management platform. benefit: The Zhongzhi AI model analyzes the threat information processed by front-end data cleaning and feature engineering. Based on its attributes and protection purposes, we accurately transfer it to the two core databases of AI IPS (Intrusion Prevention System) and AI SandStorm (Threat Analysis) for application and verification: AI IPS database integration results: In terms of intrusion prevention, the system has established a complete index and can identify ET Various threat types such as TROJAN (Trojan horse), DNS malicious domain, WEB_SPECIFIC_APPS and EXPLOIT (vulnerability attack). According to the system version record, the number of basic IPS rules before the introduction of AI was 44,888. After the introduction of the AI ​​module, 52,084 new rules were added through the AI ​​prediction model, greatly increasing the total number of IPS feature rules to 96,972. This significantly strengthens the system's interception density against variant attacks and unknown threats. • AI SandStorm database integration results: In terms of malware and URL analysis, statistics are collected on four key pieces of information: File, URL, Domain and IP. Data shows that the total size of the database after the introduction of AI technology has significantly increased from 1,568,757 transactions in the standard version to 2,224,516 transactions. This result shows that the AI ​​module has net added more than 650,000 pieces of information in this section, and the number of single categories (such as URL or Domain) far exceeds the 100,000 threshold.

solution: Foresight NexusAI - AIoT smart manufacturing platform
tech: AI visual recognition, generative AI (RAG), multi-modal AI, AI virtual measurement, RPA, AI analysis and prediction, XGBoost/LightGBM/RandomForest/Linear/Ridge/Lasso Regression/SVM (Support Vector Machine)/Bayesian Optimization (Optuna)/Vision Transformer/CLIP/BLIP/addleOCR/Tesseract/YOLO/Faster R-CNN/RetinaNet/GPT/ Gemini/LLaMA/Qwen
benefit: [1. Core pain points that the Foresight NexusAI platform can solve] 1. Information islands and data fractures: Equipment, MES, ERP, detection and reporting systems are independent of each other and cannot form a complete data chain, resulting in the inability to flow and integrate information in real time. 2. Passive quality management: Most companies are still stuck in "post-event inspection" and lack real-time warning and prediction capabilities, resulting in continued increase in scrap, rework and customer complaint costs. 3. Knowledge cannot be deposited and replicated: key experience relies on personnel and lacks a structured knowledge system, resulting in high training costs and unstable decision-making quality. 4. Decision-making response speed is too slow: It takes a lot of time from data collection to report analysis and cannot support real-time operational decisions. 5. The process is highly dependent on manual work: repetitive operations and cross-system operations cause low efficiency and risk of errors. 6. The threshold for AI introduction is high and it is difficult to scale up: AI projects are scattered and lack platform management and continuous optimization mechanisms, resulting in difficulty in introduction and high failure rate. [2. Overall benefits that the Foresight NexusAI platform can bring] 1. Comprehensive improvement in operational efficiency: data acquisition, analysis and decision-making time are shortened from "hours/days" to "minutes or even seconds", and the production process is automated and intelligent, greatly reducing manual dependence. 2. Steady improvement in quality and yield: from "spot inspection" to "full inspection" and "predictive quality control", the defective rate has been significantly reduced and product stability has been improved. 3. Cost structure optimization (cost reduction and efficiency improvement): labor costs are reduced (testing, reporting, administrative processes), scrap, heavy work and sudden equipment maintenance costs are reduced. 4. Decision-making capability upgrade (Data-driven Organization): Real-time grasp of KPIs and abnormal conditions, switching from experience-based decision-making to data-based decision-making 5. Knowledge assetization and organizational upgrading: Transform experience into a replicable AI knowledge system, shorten new employee training time, and improve organizational learning capabilities. 6. Sustainable and scalable AI introduction: Establish a replicable AI application architecture to support cross-field and cross-production line expansion [3. Foresight NexusAI platform core technology architecture] 1. Data integration and governance capabilities (Data Foundation): IoT device data collection and machine networking, multi-system data integration (MES / ERP / AOI / SPC), data cleaning, standardization and middle-end architecture 2. AI modeling and prediction capabilities (AI Engine): No-Code/Low-Code AI modeling, timing prediction, anomaly detection, quality prediction, virtual metrology and process control 3. Multi-modal AI and generative AI capabilities (AI Copilot): LLM (large language model), RAG (enterprise knowledge retrieval generation), image + text multi-modal understanding 4️.Real-time decision-making and visualization capabilities (Decision Layer): real-time KPI monitoring and early warning, automatic report generation and insight analysis, natural language query (Ask Data) 5. Process automation and execution capabilities (Action Layer): RPA process automation, AI decision-driven process execution, automatic connection between systems and task orchestration 6. Continuous learning and optimization capabilities (Learning Loop): continuous training and optimization of AI models, feedback mechanism (Closed-loop learning), cross-field experience reuse

summary: [1. Core pain points that the Foresight NexusAI platform can solve] 1. Information islands and data fractures: Equipment, MES, ERP, detection and reporting systems are independent of each other and cannot form a complete data chain, resulting in the inability to flow and integrate information in real time. 2. Passive quality management: Most companies are still stuck in "post-event inspection" and lack real-time warning and prediction capabilities, resulting in continued increase in scrap, rework and customer complaint costs. 3. Knowledge cannot be deposited and replicated: key experience relies on personnel and lacks a structured knowledge system, resulting in high training costs and unstable decision-making quality. 4. Decision-making response speed is too slow: It takes a lot of time from data collection to report analysis and cannot support real-time operational decisions. 5. The process is highly dependent on manual work: repetitive operations and cross-system operations cause low efficiency and risk of errors. 6. The threshold for AI introduction is high and it is difficult to scale up: AI projects are scattered and lack platform management and continuous optimization mechanisms, resulting in difficulty in introduction and high failure rate. [2. Overall benefits that the Foresight NexusAI platform can bring] 1. Comprehensive improvement in operational efficiency: data acquisition, analysis and decision-making time are shortened from "hours/days" to "minutes or even seconds", and the production process is automated and intelligent, greatly reducing manual dependence. 2. Steady improvement in quality and yield: from "spot inspection" to "full inspection" and "predictive quality control", the defective rate has been significantly reduced and product stability has been improved. 3. Cost structure optimization (cost reduction and efficiency improvement): labor costs are reduced (testing, reporting, administrative processes), scrap, heavy work and sudden equipment maintenance costs are reduced. 4. Decision-making capability upgrade (Data-driven Organization): Real-time grasp of KPIs and abnormal conditions, switching from experience-based decision-making to data-based decision-making 5. Knowledge assetization and organizational upgrading: Transform experience into a replicable AI knowledge system, shorten new employee training time, and improve organizational learning capabilities. 6. Sustainable and scalable AI introduction: Establish a replicable AI application architecture to support cross-field and cross-production line expansion [3. Foresight NexusAI platform core technology architecture] 1. Data integration and governance capabilities (Data Foundation): IoT device data collection and machine networking, multi-system data integration (MES / ERP / AOI / SPC), data cleaning, standardization and middle-end architecture 2. AI modeling and prediction capabilities (AI Engine): No-Code/Low-Code AI modeling, timing prediction, anomaly detection, quality prediction, virtual metrology and process control 3. Multi-modal AI and generative AI capabilities (AI Copilot): LLM (large language model), RAG (enterprise knowledge retrieval generation), image + text multi-modal understanding 4️.Real-time decision-making and visualization capabilities (Decision Layer): real-time KPI monitoring and early warning, automatic report generation and insight analysis, natural language query (Ask Data) 5. Process automation and execution capabilities (Action Layer): RPA process automation, AI decision-driven process execution, automatic connection between systems and task orchestration 6. Continuous learning and optimization capabilities (Learning Loop): continuous training and optimization of AI models, feedback mechanism (Closed-loop learning), cross-field experience reuse

solution: Portable AI inspection and processing operation standardization system.
tech: Good at machine chatter, dynamic balance, axis offset early warning, and models for judging processing problems. Data exploration, feature engineering, proxy labeling, unsupervised and semi-supervised machine learning. , PCA, GMM, DBSCAN, KNN.
benefit: Solving pain points: During the machining process, a large number of unknown errors and risks are hidden, resulting in quality deviation over time and machine anomalies. Finished product inspection alone cannot eliminate anomalies, and heavy work and waste continue to occur. In mixed operations with multiple machines, multiple personnel, or cross-site, multi-supplier scenarios, it increases the difficulty of managing quality stability and cannot meet the requirements of the automotive, aviation, and military defense industries. Benefit description: Master the process quality of cooperating factories, create cross-factory quality visibility, standardize operations, and make quality transparent. Reduce abnormalities, reduce costs, stabilize production, and reduce inventory burdens. Technical explanation: Only when problems can be seen, standardized and digitized can the work site know which points need to be improved. Based on this concept, this program establishes a "normal process standard model" by extracting and analyzing machine vibration signal characteristics, such as: workpiece installation centering, moving rails, grinding wheels/tools, spindles and other normal status models of machine parts that affect processing quality. It is used to determine whether the machine is in a stable and good product state, and to provide early warning of abnormal tendencies, identify possible abnormal items, and ensure that various processing production, such as stamping and grinding processes, are correct and consistent with the production conditions of the first good product, so as to achieve the goal of stable final production quality. In the AI ​​calculation process, data sets in different states are first analyzed, and PCA principal component analysis is used to extract representative features to form a dimensionally reduced feature data vector space. Then the GMM Gaussian mixture model plus proxy label technology (DBSCAN+KNN) is used to establish a classification and anomaly judgment model.

tech: AI Agent
benefit:
【Solution to pain points】
When the manufacturing industry introduces AI, it generally faces three major pain points: internal documents and data are dispersed within the enterprise, it is difficult to control the authority of personnel in various departments, and the cost of integrating AI tools with existing systems is high. Coupled with the diverse selection of AI models, enterprises do not know how to choose the appropriate model according to the task, resulting in ineffective introduction.

[Benefit description]
EgentHub enterprise-level AI Agent management platform allows the manufacturing industry to quickly establish a dedicated AI Agent Hub without requiring a large amount of IT resources. Manage all AI assistants, knowledge bases, and data sources through a unified platform to standardize cross-department human-machine collaboration, effectively reduce the burden of repetitive work, and precipitate corporate knowledge into a sustainable AI workflow.

【Technical Description】
EgentHub has four core technical capabilities:

RBAC permission management: With built-in role-based permission control, enterprise managers can finely configure each member's access permissions to each AI Agent, knowledge base, prompt and data source according to the organizational structure and functional needs to ensure data security and compliance.
Data source integration: Supports multiple data calling methods such as full-text search, table query, and vector query. It can process structured and unstructured data, giving AI Agent complete enterprise data access capabilities, and is suitable for knowledge management needs such as manufacturing SOP documents, quality records, and equipment resumes.
Integrate major cloud/local models: Integrate global mainstream models such as Claude, Gemini, ChatGPT, AWS Bedrock, Grok, etc., and provide a professional parameter tuning interface. Enterprises can flexibly select the most suitable model according to different task scenarios, taking into account performance and cost.
Smart Connectivity (MCP): Open up the enterprise's internal systems through the MCP protocol to build an agile and compliant information flow, allowing AI Agents to have the ability to call and apply enterprise resources in real time without the need to develop their own integration programs, significantly reducing the entry threshold.

solution: Fun2D MultiScan Mobile AI mobile multi-code scanning
tech: AI visual recognition
benefit: Functional features: - Scan multiple codes at one time - Scan high-resolution tiny 2D barcodes - Offline scanning function - Both stationary scanning and mobile scanning are available. Benefits: - Improved work efficiency: Compared with scanning one by one, multi-code simultaneous recognition can simultaneously identify multiple barcodes, QR Codes or DataMatrix Codes through a single shot, and the overall scanning speed can be increased several times. - Reduce manual errors: Machine identification and image retention reduce the risk of omissions and mis-shipments. - Strengthened quality traceability: Each shipment has image and barcode records for future audit and tracing. - Mobile operation: Multi-code identification can be completed with just a smartphone. - Reduce hardware costs: Use mobile phones to replace multiple sets of code scanning equipment and industrial control computers. - Automatic frame selection and result labeling: The system automatically frames each barcode area and displays the identification content. Usage scenarios: - Shipping inspection: Scan the entire box of product barcodes at one time to confirm items and quantities, eliminating missed scans and incorrect shipments - Warehouse inventory: Quickly count multiple items, with image retention, to establish traceable inventory records - Electronics manufacturing transit: Pass-through scanning of motherboards and electronic components, supporting high-density arrangement of microcode identification - Tray tray scanning: Scan the entire tray of components at one time, automatically identify and record the barcode data of each location - Motherboard multi-code identification: Quickly read multiple serial numbers and material numbers on the motherboard, improving site transfer efficiency and reducing manual errors - Medical UDI: Meets UDI medical equipment tracking requirements, scans and retains images and identification records

solution: Ruide AI smart energy management system
tech:
1. Application of Big Data Analytics
*High frequency collection and flow rate (High Velocity): The system performs precise global collection every 2 minutes (120 seconds) to ensure data recording reaches second-level resolution. This high-frequency monitoring mechanism can completely capture instantaneous changes in power and is the necessary foundation for precise energy management.
*Large-scale data processing (Volume & Value): A single monitoring unit stably produces more than 14,400 pieces of high-dimensional power characteristic data every day. The system has excellent performance in processing hundreds of thousands of massive data every day, converting complex raw data into digital assets that comply with the ISO 50001 energy baseline and ISO 14064 carbon inventory standards, providing enterprises with high-resolution data support with legal validity.

2. Application of Machine Learning
*Load prediction model (Predictive Modeling): The system uses high-quality big data as training samples, imports the Time Series Forecasting algorithm, and independently learns and masters the energy consumption rules of the production line. AI predicts power demand in advance, proactively prompts the risk of exceeding appointments, and implements intelligent "peak shaving" optimization.
*Predictive Maintenance: The system establishes equipment operation power fingerprints through Unsupervised Learning. When AI detects subtle fluctuations that are inconsistent with the historical baseline, it immediately determines it as an abnormal working condition and sends an alarm, intervening before equipment failure and shutdown to maximize production utilization.
benefit:
1. System Overview and Construction Practice
This tool is specially designed for various industrial transformation and carbon management needs, and has high field applicability (such as electronics, machinery, traditional manufacturing, warehousing and chain stores, etc.). Through the technology integration of Ruide Smart Manufacturing, "rapid deployment" and "painless transformation" are achieved. The professional engineering team can ensure that on-site data collection and system launch are completed without disturbing the operation of existing production lines, creating a solid digital energy foundation for enterprises.
2. Core technical functions
• Whole-site power monitoring: The system is highly flexible and can be applied to "whole plant energy management" or "single key equipment" monitoring based on demand, accurately grasping energy consumption details in different dimensions.
• Full-time recording of electricity consumption values: Automatically retrieve meter values ​​through the Modbus TCP protocol and store them in the SQL database to ensure data integrity and autonomy.
• AI power consumption alarm notification: Use Machine Learning (ML) machine learning technology to independently infer abnormal working conditions and send notifications in real time to help managers accurately control contract capacity and effectively prevent high electricity bills from exceeding the contract.
• Prediction of peak electricity consumption periods: Use AI algorithms to analyze historical loads, predict peak periods of electricity consumption, provide scheduling optimization suggestions, and realize intelligent peak shaving and valley filling.
• Intelligent monitoring of power quality: Monitor current and voltage fluctuations, detect subtle power abnormalities, and prevent potential power risks.
3. System composition and Ruide customization advantages
• Industrial-grade edge computing unit: Using high-precision smart meters and RST three-phase dedicated current comparators (CT), together with an edge computing controller (Edge Controller) that supports multiple communication protocols, to ensure data accuracy and anti-interference capabilities in complex industrial environments.
• Ruide's exclusive customized software: Combined with Ruide's in-depth development experience in the field of smart manufacturing, it provides a highly customized monitoring interface, automated alarm logic and exclusive data reports, which can fully fit the actual operation process of the enterprise and is not comparable to ordinary packaged software.
• Carbon emission management module: The system has a built-in automatic conversion function that instantly converts electricity consumption into carbon dioxide emissions and supports the automatic generation of carbon management reports that meet regulatory requirements.
4. International standards and third-party certification support
The data collected by this system has the highest level of reliability and traceability, and is the best data evidence for enterprises to obtain certification from third-party international organizations, ensuring that carbon reduction results are in line with international credibility:
• ISO 50001: Energy management systems.
• ISO 14064-1: Organizational Greenhouse Gas Inventory.
• ISO 14067: Product carbon footprint.
• ESG Sustainability Report: Provides accurate energy performance indicators (EnPIs) to meet the disclosure requirements of the Financial Supervisory Commission and international supply chains (such as RE100).
5. Expected benefits and transformation value
• Establishing a "Carbon Emissions War Room": Through an intuitive real-time dashboard, the company's digital strength in green production and energy governance can be demonstrated to international customers and review agencies, greatly improving its competitiveness in obtaining green orders.
• Implement "Predictive Maintenance": Use AI to continuously monitor power characteristics to identify potential anomalies (such as motor overheating or power instability) before serious equipment failures occur, reduce unplanned downtime, and significantly extend the service life of production assets.
• Precise energy saving and carbon reduction: Using data to discover potential blind spots in energy consumption not only reduces electricity bills, but also implements substantial carbon reduction, helping enterprises move towards net-zero emission goals.
• Data autonomy and security: Users have the final ownership of the database, and the data is stored in the company's internal environment to ensure the security of business secrets, and professional analysis reports can be exported at any time.

summary: GeniAltX is an AI-native knowledge management and reasoning platform specially built for enterprises. It is designed to help organizations transform large and scattered unstructured materials (such as PDFs, briefings, forms, technical documents, recordings and images) into knowledge systems that can be understood, searched and reasoned. From cross-border policy document compilation, industry trend research, ESG intelligent comparison, patent cross-search, to retail investment decision-making and other situations, this platform can be used to automate the process of query, comparison, analysis and summary generation, helping organizations improve decision-making efficiency, reduce knowledge loss, strengthen cross-department collaboration, and use AI
